name: Caiaphas
oracleText: When Caiaphas enters the battlefield, each opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card unless they pay 2 life.
flavorText: "It is expedient for us, that one man should die for the people." — John 11:50
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics were added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide.
title: High Priest of Judgment
